title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Emami Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Emami Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Emami Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Emami Digital Technologies:
Emami Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
